items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Deduped source selections per grant', but the prior steps do not provide any direct evidence or checks related to this specific requirement. While there are multiple successful operations related to bookings and resource management, none of them confirm the implementation or validation of deduped source selections. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence is lacking.
